(Translated by Google)
Very good prices and fast service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSNlZHbDVPVk4xUVd4Q1dGUmtPRlZ3TmpWWmFWRRAB

reviews.comment:
A la fecha, lindo lugar de pasó para estirar un poco las piernas y picar algo, por el momento sólo éso podría decirles, en cuanto a baños venimos flojo eso si limpios pero no les vendría mal una mano de mantenimiento o renovación, después de éso la mejor como siempre sólo que la gente también debería acompañar y cuidar de estos lugares también todos necesitamos pasar y seguir viajé no nos olvidemos qué detrás de nosotros bienen también otros con tus mismos derechos

(Translated by Google)
To date, it's a nice place to stop and stretch your legs and grab a bite. For now, that's all I can say. As for the restrooms, they're a bit shaky, though clean, but they could use some maintenance or renovation. Aside from that, it's great as always, but people should also take care of these places. We all need to pass through and continue our journeys; let's not forget that others with the same rights come after us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21vNGFHNVpVbTlWTjI1MVgzbHVRWEZRUkc1QlNXYxAB

reviews.comment:
El playero lento,eran dos,lo peor estás mirando dónde cargar y te aparece una mujer golpeando el vidrio vendiendo ,no se que cosa,niñas entre los autos vendiendo otra cosa,un desastre, puede ocurrir una desgracia, no recomiendo ir, experiencia pésima.lastima ya que la ubicación es estratégicamente ideal.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant was slow; there were two of them. The worst part was, you're looking for a place to charge and a woman suddenly appears banging on the window, selling who-knows-what. There were also girls between the cars selling something else. It was a disaster; something terrible could happen. I don't recommend going. It was a terrible experience. It's a shame because the location is strategically ideal.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu comentario PaLy, estamos arbitrando medios con el municipio para regular la presencia de vendedores ambulantes en via publica, realmente es una situacion que tambien nos preocupa. Lamentamos que no hayas tenido una buena experiencia!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWbmVITm5WMFk0VjI1RWFuZHpkM0k0Um1WcVpXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante concurrido por estar sobre la ruta, muy buena atención, te dan el ticket aunque no lo pidas, a diferencia de otras estaciones de servicio. Cuenta con un pequeño motel.

(Translated by Google)
It's quite busy because it's on the highway, but the service is very good; they give you a receipt even if you don't ask for it, unlike some other gas stations. It also has a small motel.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Gardo, gracias por tu reseña! Saludos..
